
  // Type_map
  public class Type_map {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var generic_map : Generic_map?
  }
  // Generic_map_any
  public class Generic_map_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_map
    }
  }
  // Generic_map
  public class Generic_map {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var listkeyn : [String] = []
    // p_any_from_keyn
    public func p_any_from_keyn(
      _ keyn : String
    ) -> Type_any {
      return e_any
    }
    // p_anymap
    public func p_anymap(
    ) -> Type_anymap {
      return e_anymap
    }
    // p_mapany
    public func p_mapany(
    ) -> [String : Type_any] {
      return [:]
    }
    // p_listkeyn
    public func p_listkeyn(
    ) -> [String] {
      return listkeyn
    }
  }
  // Generic_map_map
  public class Generic_map_map : Vx_Core.Generic_map {
  }
  // Generic_map_type
  public class Generic_map_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_map = v_map_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_map = v_map_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_map = v_map_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_map = f_map(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_map_constructor
  public static func v_map_constructor(
  ) -> Type_map {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_map()
  }
  // v_map_create
  public static func v_map_create(
  ) -> Type_map {
    var output : Type_map = v_map_constructor()
    v_map_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_map_register
  public static func v_map_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_map_startup_type()
    v_map_startup_empty()
    return t_map
  }
  // v_map_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_map_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_map
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_map_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_map = Vx_Core.e_map
  }
  // v_map_startup - mutating
  public static func v_map_startup(
    _ value : Type_map
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_map_any = Generic_map_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_map,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_map_startup_empty
  public static func v_map_startup_empty() {
    v_map_startup(e_map)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_map,
      e_map.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_map_startup_type
  public static func v_map_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_map
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/map")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_map
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_map_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_map
  public static func v_any_from_map(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_map
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_map_from_any
  public static func v_map_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_map {
    let generic_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any = Vx_Core.v_generic_any_from_any(type_any)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_map = generic_any.p_type_map()
    return output
  }
  // v_map_new_from_any_generic_map
  public static func v_map_new_from_any_generic_map(
    _ type_any : Type_any,
    _ generic_map : Generic_map
  ) -> Type_map {
    let output : Type_map = Type_map()
    output.type_any = type_any
    output.generic_map = generic_map
    generic_map.type_any = type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_map_copy
  public static func v_map_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_map,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_map {
    return copyval
  }
  // f_map
  public static func f_map(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_map {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_map = v_map_copy(e_map, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_map : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_map : Type_map = v_map_constructor()
